If an employee has been employed for 36 months or more, they automatically qualify for the Senior Bonus, provided they have not taken unpaid leave exceeding 30 consecutive days in the current fiscal year. An employee cannot receive both the Standard Bonus and the Senior Bonus simultaneously
column2: if they qualify for both, the Senior Bonus supersedes the Standard Bonus. If an employee has any formal disciplinary actions, they forfeit all bonus eligibility.

If an employee has been employed for 36 months or more, they automatically qualify for the Senior Bonus, provided they have not taken unpaid leave exceeding 30 consecutive days in the current fiscal year. An employee cannot receive both the Standard Bonus and the Senior Bonus simultaneously
column2: if they qualify for both, the Senior Bonus supersedes the Standard Bonus. If an employee has any formal disciplinary actions, they forfeit all bonus eligibility.
